questionHtml: State the difference in the cerebral cortex between the two images of the brain.
markschemeHtml:
a. «image II shows» reduction in size/volume/total amount of tissue/lobes 

b. «image II shows» increased space between foldings 

c. «image II shows» reduced surface area

Allow vice versa for image I.

meta.title: State the difference in the cerebral cortex between the two images of the brain.
